debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X Y : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hY : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m Y u q P
⊢ map (fun ω => X ω ∩ Y ω) P = @ProbabilityTheory.bernoulliOn ι u (p * q)

failed_attempts:
by
    classical
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, HasLaw] using
      (hX.map_eq.trans hY.map_eq.symm)
  aemeasurable := sorry

by
    classical
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, HasLaw] using (hX.inter hY)
  aemeasurable := sorry

  aemeasurable := sorry

    have hXm : Measurable X := hX.aemeasurable
    have hYm : Measurable Y := hY.aemeasurable
